title: Tito's Moscow Mule
description: Tito's Vodka, fresh lime juice, and spicy ginger beer served ice-cold in a copper mug. One of the most popular vodka cocktails of all time.

ingredients.note: about 1 lime, plus extra wedge for garnish
not ginger ale — ginger beer is spicier and less sweet

ingredients.item: lime wedge, fresh mint sprig, and ice

steps.instruction: Fill a copper mug (or a regular glass) with ice.
Add Tito's Vodka over the ice.
Squeeze fresh lime juice in and drop the squeezed lime half into the mug.
Top with ginger beer. Do not stir — just let it settle so the ginger beer stays carbonated.
Garnish with a lime wedge and a fresh sprig of mint. Serve immediately.

notes: Always use ginger beer, not ginger ale — the difference is significant. Ginger beer has a real spicy kick that makes this drink. A copper mug keeps it colder longer and is the classic vessel, but any glass works.
